quoteFirst: It took three hours for the half battalion to grope its way toward the Austrian line, but shortly before 5 o'clock they were ready to attack, and at
quoteLast: a fierce French box barrage--in front and behind the enemy trenches and from the flanks--was opened on the enemy trenches, and the Italian and British artillery on either side started a distracting bombardment.
